task_completion.description: Verify that the agent selected the correct patient and entered the required condition.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GNU Health screen showing the patient 'Bonifacio Caput' with an active condition or diagnosis of Giardiasis (ICD-10 A07.x) or Infectious gastroenteritis (ICD-10 A09).

task_completion.description: Verify that the clinical evaluation includes the required dehydration vitals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a patient evaluation or vitals screen showing Heart Rate (HR) of 100 bpm or higher, and Systolic Blood Pressure (Sys BP) of 100 mmHg or lower.
Look for a prescription order screen for the patient containing 'Metronidazole'.

task_completion.description: Verify that an additional medication was prescribed alongside Metronidazole.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the prescription screen showing at least two distinct medication lines (e.g., Metronidazole and Sodium Chloride or Oral Rehydration Salts).

task_completion.description: Verify that a diagnostic laboratory test was ordered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a laboratory request or order screen showing at least one test ordered for the patient (e.g., Stool analysis, CMP).

task_completion.description: Verify that a follow-up appointment was scheduled for 1 to 3 days from the current date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an appointment scheduling screen showing a booked appointment for Bonifacio Caput with a date set 1 to 3 days in the future.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health desktop client being actively used, rather than terminal commands or direct database queries (e.g., psql).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually entered the data into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for filled input fields, selected dropdowns, and saved records within the GNU Health interface, not just text written in a notepad or terminal.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal (if visible) should not show execution of python scripts or SQL commands designed to insert the medical records directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Bonifacio Caput. Required ICD-10 codes: A07.x or A09. Required Vitals: Heart Rate >= 100, Systolic BP <= 100. Required Prescription: Metronidazole plus at least one other medication (minimum 2 prescription lines). Required Lab Orders: At least 1. Required Follow-up: 1 to 3 days from the current date.
